about.overview_text: Demo Model School & College is a premier educational institution in Dhaka, Bangladesh, dedicated to providing a holistic learning experience that combines academic excellence with character development. Since our founding in 1995, we have been at the forefront of educational innovation, preparing students for the challenges of the 21st century.

about.success_desc: Our graduates consistently secure admissions to the most prestigious universities in Bangladesh and abroad.

history.hero_desc: A journey of excellence, character building, and academic success since 1995.
history.milestones_p: In its first decade, the college focused on establishing a culture of discipline and rigorous academic standards. By 2005, we had doubled our student capacity and introduced state-of-the-art laboratory facilities, setting a new benchmark for secondary education in Dhaka.
history.p1: Founded in 1995, Demo Model School & College began with a simple yet profound goal: to provide world-class education that is accessible to all. What started as a small initiative with 10 teachers and 100 students in a modest building has now evolved into one of Bangladesh's premier educational institutions.
history.p2: Over the last three decades, we have consistently secured top positions in the Dhaka Education Board results. Our alumni are now leaders in medicine, engineering, public service, and the arts, carrying forward the values of integrity and service they learned within these walls.
history.p3: Today, Demo Model School & College stands as a symbol of progress, blending tradition with modern technology. Our commitment remains unchanged: to nurture the next generation of leaders who will contribute meaningfully to the nation and the world.
history.title: Our History

holidays.table_note: Lunar-based holidays (e.g., Eid-ul-Fitr, Shab-e-Barat) are subject to the sighting of the moon. Any changes to the scheduled dates will be notified immediately through our official channels.

mission.core_values_desc: The principles that guide our institutional culture and daily decision-making.
mission.hero_desc: Defining our path through core values, clear vision, and a steadfast mission.
mission.mission_text: To empower students with a holistic education that blends academic rigor with ethical integrity, preparing them to lead with purpose in a global society. We strive to create an environment where brilliance meets social responsibility.
mission.vision_text: To be recognized as a center of excellence that nurtures intellectual curiosity, character development, and a lifelong passion for learning and innovation. We aim to set the benchmark for transformative education in Bangladesh.

person.hero_faculty_desc: Meet the dedicated educators of Demo Model School & College. Our faculty members combine deep academic expertise with a passion for mentoring students to reach their highest potential.
person.hero_staff_desc: Our administrative and support staff are the backbone of Demo Model School & College. They ensure that daily operations run smoothly and provide essential services to students, parents, and faculty.
person.not_found_desc: Try changing your search or filters to find what you are looking for.

principal.msg_p1: Welcome to Demo Model School & College. It is an honor to serve as the Principal of this institution, which has been a hub of academic excellence in Dhaka since 1995. Our goal has always been clear: to provide a nurturing environment where every student can achieve their full potential.
principal.msg_p2: In today’s rapidly changing world, education must go beyond the traditional boundaries of textbooks. At Demo Model School & College, we emphasize "holistic development." We combine a rigorous academic curriculum with a wide range of co-curricular activities to ensure our graduates are not just well-educated, but are well-rounded individuals ready to face global challenges.
principal.msg_p3: Our state-of-the-art facilities, dedicated faculty, and technology-integrated classrooms provide the perfect setting for learning. Whether it is in the science lab, on the sports field, or in the debating hall, we encourage our students to be curious, to ask questions, and to dream big.
principal.msg_p4: I invite you to explore our website and learn more about our college. To the parents, thank you for trusting us with your child’s future. To the students, remember that your journey at Demo Model School & College is just the beginning of a lifetime of success.
principal.msg_quote: We do not just teach subjects; we instill values. Our aim is to create leaders who will lead with integrity, empathy, and innovation.
principal.quote: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world. At Demo Model School & College, we do not just teach students; we empower them with values that last a lifetime.
principal.msg_closing: I invite you to explore our website and learn more about our college. To the parents, thank you for trusting us with your child's future. To the students, remember that your journey at Demo Model School & College is just the beginning of a lifetime of success.
principal.msg_facilities: Our state-of-the-art facilities, dedicated faculty, and technology-integrated classrooms provide the perfect setting for learning. Whether it is in the science lab, on the sports field, or in the debating hall, we encourage our students to be curious, to ask questions, and to dream big.
principal.msg_holistic: In today's rapidly changing world, education must go beyond the traditional boundaries of textbooks. At Demo Model School & College, we emphasize "holistic development." We combine a rigorous academic curriculum with a wide range of co-curricular activities to ensure our graduates are not just well-educated, but are well-rounded individuals ready to face global challenges.

routine.hero_desc: Stay updated with our latest class schedules and shift information.
routine.info_text: These routines are applicable for the first semester of the 2026 academic session. For special holiday schedules or exam routines, please keep an eye on our notice board.
routine.support_text: If you cannot find the routine for your class or specific shift, please contact the administrative office or check back later.

rules.attendance_text: A minimum of 80% attendance is mandatory for students to be eligible for terminal and final examinations. In case of absence due to illness, a medical certificate must be submitted within three days of joining.
rules.campus_text: College property must be respected. Vandalism or littering will result in strict disciplinary action. Students are encouraged to participate in keeping the campus green and clean.
rules.discipline_text: Students are expected to maintain the highest standards of behavior. Punctuality is mandatory. Students must reach the campus at least 15 minutes before the first bell. Use of mobile phones or any unauthorized electronic devices is strictly prohibited on campus.
rules.hero_desc: Defining the standards of behavior and discipline that foster a respectful learning environment.
rules.title: Code of Conduct
rules.uniform_text: Students must wear the prescribed college uniform on all working days. The uniform must be clean, well-pressed, and worn with the official college ID card. Boys must maintain a standard hair length, and girls should avoid excessive jewelry or makeup.

testimonial1.content: The transformation I have seen in my son’s confidence and academic performance since joining this college is remarkable. The teachers are incredibly supportive.
testimonial1.name: Mrs. Sultana Razia

testimonial2.content: Demo Model School & College does not just focus on grades. They really care about character building. My daughter has learned to be more disciplined and responsible here.
testimonial2.name: Mr. Ahmed Ullah

testimonial3.content: The digital classroom facilities and modern science labs are among the best in the city. It is a great environment for science-minded students.
testimonial3.name: Engr. Kamrul Islam

welcome.text1: At Demo Model School & College, we believe in providing more than just an academic education. Since our inception in 1995, we have been committed to fostering an environment where curiosity is encouraged and character is built.
welcome.text2: Our institution stands as a beacon of quality education in Dhaka, offering both Bangla and English versions to cater to diverse student needs. We pride ourselves on our state-of-the-art facilities and a curriculum that balances rigorous academics with vibrant extracurricular activities.
welcome.title: Welcome to
